title: Fresh Japanese Kielbasa Bowl
description: A fresh, crisp take on a nostalgic Japanese dish featuring kielbasa and dashi extract, nut-free friendly.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced kielbasa and cook until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
In a small saucepan, combine dashi extract and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
While dashi is cooking, prepare short-grain rice according to package instructions.
Add sliced scallions and shredded daikon to the skillet with the kielbasa and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked rice in the bottom of each bowl, followed by sliced kielbasa, pickled ginger, and a spoonful of hot dashi broth.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional pickled ginger if desired.
